stemHtml: Two aircraft are in a holding pattern. Aircraft A is at a higher level than Aircraft B and both aircraft need to descend. Which of the following clearances will ATC provide to maintain the required separation?

options.a: Aircraft B will be given a minimum descent rate and Aircraft A will be given a maximum descent rate
options.b: Aircraft B will be given a maximum descent rate and Aircraft A will be given a minimum descent rate
options.c: Aircraft B will be given an average descent rate and Aircraft A will be given a maximum descent rate
options.d: Aircraft B will be given a minimum descent rate and Aircraft A will be given an average descent rate
